commands.review_summary:
The PR adds DeepSeek DSML event capture and OpenAI-compatible stream recovery that turns complete declared DSML invokes into synthetic tool-call blocks, with expanded regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +496, Tests +912. Total +1408 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main strips DeepSeek DSML text but only executes native `choiceDelta.tool_calls`, while the linked issue and PR proof show the reported Foundry/DeepSeek payload emitted as assistant text.
